CONTENT.Club career: In 2010, Okoh began his career at FC Espagnol Lausanne, before moving to FC Lausanne-Sport in 2016. In 2019, he moved to the youth team of Red Bull Salzburg and has been playing in their feeder team of Liefering since 2019.On 9 August 2019, he made his professional debut for Liefering in an away match against Lafnitz, ending in a 2–0 loss.
CONTENT.Personal life: He was born in Houston, Texas, to Igbo Nigerian parents, but grew up in Switzerland.
CONTENT.External links: Bryan Okoh at WorldFootball.netBryan Okoh at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: Okoh has represented Switzerland from under-15 to under-21 age group.

SUMMARY: Bryan Ikemefuna Okoh (born 16 May 2003) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a centre back for Austrian Bundesliga club Red Bull Salzburg. Born in the United States, he represents Switzerland at youth international level.
